variables.name: Daughter mass number
variables.description: Mass number of the daughter nucleus after the reaction.

variables.name: Parent mass number
variables.description: Mass number of the parent nucleus (total protons and neutrons).

variables.name: Particle mass number
variables.description: Mass number of the emitted or incoming particle.

variables.description: Mass number of the emitted or incoming particle.

variables.description: Number of protons in the parent nucleus.

variables.name: Parent atomic number
variables.description: Number of protons in the parent nucleus.
